ideals: I addressed challenges with creativity, cheer, or trust in my allies
I expressed my heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
system.secondWind: You can regain all effort when someone helps you out of a bad situation. Your rescuer can also recover 1 effort.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: Characters that successfully aid you or set you up can recover 1 effort, but no more than once a session.

powers.name: Improvise
powers.description: 2/session - Push a smash roll for free if using something that's not a weapon. I: Small. II: Large. III: Massive.

powers.name: Punching Bag
powers.description: If you take strain from anything, everyone else gets increased effect against that thing for the rest of the scene.

powers.name: Best Efforts
powers.description: If you fail a set-up roll, take 1 strain to re-roll it. Can do this any number of times.

powers.name: Bright Eyed
powers.description: At start of each session, choose a character to look up to. Aid them without spending effort, but aiding others costs 2 effort.

powers.name: Follow the Leader
powers.description: 1/session - Make an action roll using any character's action rating. Describe how they taught or inspired you.

powers.name: Lost Cat
powers.description: If you invoked burdens to get in trouble, choose a character that came to your aid. They mark 1 xp at end of session.

powers.name: Rash
powers.description: 1/session - Boast about success before rolling. Roll at max 0d, regain 1 effort after. On success (4+), everyone regains 1 effort.

powers.name: Underdog
powers.description: When you become exhausted, your next action gains +1d and increased effect.

powers.name: Heart Held Dream
powers.description: Gain +1d on ambition clocks of 10+ segments. When complete, lift a burden or allow an ally to lift a burden.

powers.name: The Lobster
powers.description: If you break, your next action can be made normally and gains superpowered effect.

powers.name: Gambit of The Wanderers
powers.description: Take a power from another bond.

gearKits.name: Adventurer's Kit
items: Lantern, pack, bedroll, rope, flint and tinder, journal, rations, cooking pot, knife, canvas tent

gearKits.name: Improvised Kit
items: Fistful of sand, convenient rock, makeshift key, homemade tool, pocket snacks, slingshot

gearKits.name: Unlucky Kit
items: A sudden fall, an untied knot, a slip, a broken pot or cup, a flying object

gearKits.name: Lucky Kit
items: A single useful clue, a sudden change in lighting, a shift in the weather, a convenient noise, a useful crack in a wall or door
